title: Soft Gun and Thin Rain
description: Small Volume Survival Firearms Integration Pack
body:
This is a small-sized survival gun mod pack with a maximum of no more than 22 (formerly 26) mods. My 11-year-old HP 440 G2 can still run it at 60fps. It includes simple optimizations, guns, and zombies. Recommended for players who want a low to medium survival difficulty! :) Note: The Low version (Fabric) has fewer mods, offering smoother performance; the Plus version (Forge) has more mods, providing a more complete experience.
这是一款最高不多于22（曾经是26）个mod的小体积生存+枪械的整合包，我的有11年机龄的hp 440 g2仍能以60fps与之一战。里面包括了简单优化、枪械和僵尸，建议想要低中等生存难度的玩家试一试！:)注：Low版（Fabric）模组少，提供更流畅的运行；Plus版（Forge）模组多，提供更完善的体验。
